feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Assistance Required with Email Sending Authorization in RAP-Based Application
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have developed a RAP-based application for S/4HANA Public Cloud and added an action button for sending emails. During debugging, I encountered an authorization issue within the method used for email sending.

Despite the user having the BR_ADMINISTRATOR role assigned, the issue persists. I would greatly appreciate your assistance in resolving this authorization problem.

For better clarity, I’ve included some lines of code where I checked the authorization. Instead of receiving a value of 0 in sy-subrc, I got a value of 12. I’ve also attached the relevant screenshots for your reference.

Looking forward to your support.

Best regards,
Varun Tyagi

entry.title: Create records in same session with two separate MODIFY calls on BO using RAP but only 1st call pass
entry.content:
I am trying to create records in same session by calling modify on the BO (using RAP internally). THe first modify call passes and creates the record but second modify call fails during COMMIT (there were no failed keys during second Modify) . 

Exception: CX_ABAP_BEHV_COMMIT_FAILED

 

THere is no entry in Failed Entry after Modify but COMMIT work gives error. 

ALso if i try to call modify of the same data in separate session, it passes. Why is there an issue with back to back create of different entries in same session?

entry.title: Add Custom F4 help on Standard Fields in SAP Fiori apps
entry.content:
Hello experts,

In one of the Standard Fiori Apps i.e. For Example: Service Order analysis.  we have standard filter in which there are few Date field in it, for example: Planned (Start, End) Date, Requested (Start, End) Date. when clicked on F4 help a Pop-up Appears and displays Week no as an input to filter the data.

But, Customer Requirement is to add Date(DD.MM.YYYY) as a input field. meaning when clicked on f4 pop-up should appear to choose date and based on that data should be filtered.

I checked in details and found that app is based on Fiori Elements and there is one CDS for F4 help ( to display Week no ). 

I checked lot of blogs  & Videos they mostly explains about adding a custom field and adding F4 using CDS But, in my case already there is a F4 help on standard field with Weekno as input, and i need to replace it with date as Input.

I need your input on how to achieve this Requirement.  Please guide.

entry.title: Deep creation of Product via I_PRODUCTTP_2 does not work
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to create a new, basic product via the RAP-BO I_PRODUCTTP_2.
I filled all reqired fields and, as the desciption i a required field, too, I tried to create deep the description, using the association _productdescription.

In no constellation the modify / commit is successful.
Now I get the error:
Property PRODUCT is a key and cannot be initial CMD_PROD_RAP(003)
But: I provided the root entity with this content and I cannot provide it to the sub-node as it is inherited from the root node.
Is there a way to get beyound this?

I'm using an OnPrem 758 system SAP S/4HANA 2023 SP01 (02/2024) FPS system
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
DATA(productid) = '000000000053009920'.

MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_producttp_2
ENTITY product
CREATE FIELDS ( product baseunit productgroup laboratoryordesignoffice crossplantstatus
weightunit producttype industrysector ) WITH VALUE #( ( %cid = 'prd1'
product = productid
baseunit = 'KG'
productgroup = '5121'
laboratoryordesignoffice = 'AS1'
crossplantstatus = 'E0'
weightunit = 'KG'
producttype = 'HALB'
industrysector = 'M' ) )
CREATE BY \_productdescription
FIELDS ( productdescription language )
WITH VALUE #( ( %cid_ref = 'prd1'
%target = VALUE #( ( %cid = 'prddescr1'
product = productid
productdescription = 'My Description'
language = 'E' ) ) ) )
FAILED FINAL(failed) ##NEEDED
REPORTED FINAL(reported) ##NEEDED.

entry.title: RAP - implement a validation on delete action
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a very basic requirement in RAP. I want to implement a validation on a given field when the user deletes an entity (reject the deletion if a given field has a given value)
So I used this syntax in the Behavior Definition
validation checkDelete on save {delete;}
Now in the method checkDelete, when I try to retrieve the data of the entity to be deleted using READ ENTITY with keys it returns nothing as if the entity has already been deleted.
My question is what's the point of giving the possibility to perform a validation on delete action if we cannot access the entity data in the validation handler method and how could I implement my check.
I'm new in RAP so I'm maybe missing something here

Thank you for your help
Mourad

entry.title: RAP Extensibility
entry.content:
Hello, i have a question regarding the extensibility of standard RAP Business Objects.
So a Customer wants to add some customer specific fields to the standard table aufk, which has so far been solved via a customer include. However, as part of the transformation, this is obsolete and should be made cloud ready. Therefore my idea was to create an Adaption Project of the required standard Fiori Application and extend it via a custoper specific CDS model with an underlying dtab to make the values for the custom fields persistent.
This is where the extensibility of the standard behavior definition for said Application comes in. Since it does not have the 'extensable' feature enabled, i need a workaround. So the question is, if i now create my own behavior definition, is there a way to include the standard behavior to keep it safe for SAP updates and to keep it managing the part which writes into the aufk table?

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: EML: Read All Instances of a BO
entry.content:
In an ABAP RAP project, I want to read all instances of a BusinessObject via the EML statement "READ ..." like

READ ENTITIES OF zstore IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY store
ALL FIELDS
WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
RESULT result_stores.

but without providing any key, since I want to read all instances.

So, basically, I want to do a query "SELECT * FROM mytable" but as an EML statement for a BusinessObject.

Is that possible, and if so, how?

entry.title: FIORI Elements Field Highlighting not working in CREATE Mode but EDIT Mode
entry.content:
Hi, 

i have generated FIORI Elements List Report Page. As Backend i am using BOPF with SAP NW 7.50.

UI5 Version is 1.108.26

Problem:

Field highlighting only works in EDIT Mode, in CREATE Mode there is no error Message at all. Removing Attribute Parameter leads to error message displayed but without reference to Field.

  METHOD /bobf/if_frw_validation~execute.
    CLEAR: eo_message, et_failed_key.

    DATA: it_example_data TYPE z_t_pmc_scen_auth,
          location        TYPE /bobf/s_frw_location,
          lo_cm           TYPE REF TO /bobf/cm_frw.

    io_read->retrieve(
      EXPORTING
        iv_node                 = zif_pm_c_scen_auth_c=>sc_node-zpm_c_scen_auth
        it_key                  = it_key
      IMPORTING
        eo_message              = eo_message
        et_data                 = it_example_data
        et_failed_key           = et_failed_key
    ).

    IF eo_message IS NOT BOUND.
      eo_message = /bobf/cl_frw_factory=>get_message(  ).
    ENDIF.

    LOOP AT it_example_data INTO DATA(line).

      "Error occured
      eo_message->add_message(
        EXPORTING
          is_msg       = VALUE #( msgid = 'ZCO' msgno = '002' msgty = 'E' )
          iv_node      = is_ctx-node_key
          iv_key       = line-key
          iv_attribute = zif_pm_c_scen_auth_c=>sc_node_attribute-zif_pm_c_scen_auth-auth_role
*      iv_lifetime  =

      ).
      APPEND VALUE #( key = line-key ) TO et_failed_key.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDMETHOD.

Result in EDIT Mode:

Result in Create Mode with Attribute provided: SAVE is prevented but there is no error message at all.
Removing Parameter Attribute:

Is this a problem with used SAPUI5 Version?

entry.title: Create By Association for 1:1 composition in RAP Unmanaged
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement where I have a composition (parent-child relationship) of cardinality 1:1.
When I click on Edit and create a parent, I want the child section to be editable as well. So that I can enter values for both parent and child and create a record.

But that is not how the system is behaving.
Is there any special way of handling such 1:1 compositions?

In the below screenshot, LimitingRule is the child and should also be editable when creating a Trigger entity.
The parent(Trigger Details) is editable but not the child(LimitingRule).

Thanks in advance!!
Shivam Chadha

entry.title: How to pass multiple values to function import in odata service
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I want to create a RAP BO with a behaviors. The behavior will have a function to perform a complex query. As we know, function is translated to the function import of OData service. But I don't understand how to pass multiple values to the function import while I test the OData service. E.g. I want to pass an array of material numbers to my function import parameter.

Can you please suggest how to do that?

Adding few ABAP experts for visibility @CarineTchoutouo @Andre_Fischer @Ramjee_korada 

Thanks,

Mainak

NW ABAP Gateway (OData) SAP Gateway ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: RAP - Root page action button, with single selection row causes child page to open issue ?
entry.content:
Hi Product and Topic Expert,

I have issue with action button. I have a list report with root and child page and my root page has one action button ( name is : "E-Fatura Gönder ve Satüyü Değiştir" ).

When I select single row and push action button "E-Fatura Gönder ve Satüyü Değiştir" , that causes child page to open issue.

But, when I select multi row and push action button "E-Fatura Gönder ve Satüyü Değiştir" , that work fine and I am on the sama page. It will not be navigate to child page.

I need to your help out for issue...

Regarding this issue screenshots are down below..:

When select single row, push action button "E-Fatura Gönder ve Satüyü Değiştir" ...

That causes child page to open issue.

entry.title: Standard Fields are not available in BAPI Successors I_MaterialDocumentTP
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to post GR using BO I_MATERIALDOCUMENTTP. Required to pass extension fields such as WRF_CHARSTC1 (Characteristic Value 1), WRF_CHARSTC2 (Characteristic Value 2). But, it is not available when using MODIFY ENTITIES OF I_MaterialDocumentTP and it is not extensible also. Earlier in standard BAPI , these fields  are filled under extension structures.

Any suggestions ?

RISE with SAP  MM (Materials Management) ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: RAP / Restful Application Programming Mode: ListReport on ObjectPage but restrict further navigation
entry.content:
Hello @ALL,

the MDE of a given CDS Root View Entity consists of multiple facets, some of these are of the type #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE (for purpose: #HEADER), some have the type #LINEITEM_REFERENCE (for purpose: #STANDARD).

A lineitem facet is intended to be displayed on the object page, as such it utilizes the annotation 'targetElement' with reference to a composition[0..*] _Example. The data is successfully pulled into the facet and the object page correctly displays the data being present.

But there is a problem.

Generally, the definition of lineitems automatically allows for further navigation - so if a lineitem is clicked on the initial page of a list report for example, then navigation to the object page behind it will start. This will also happen, if the lineitems have been defined inside the object page - such that - a lineitem clicked on the object page, will navigate further into the next page.

Is it possible to define a list of items on the object page, which do not allow further navigation, but could possibly be edited if necessary via the appropiate CRUD operation?

The goal is to have a list displayed like:

In the image example above, it appears as though further navigation would not be possible by clicking on one of its items. This restriction is activily sought for in my scenario, but I can not find any sources with regards to its implementation.

Thanks in advance for every comment!

entry.title: FIORI Elements: Missing UI Message from Backend
entry.content:
Hi, 

i have created FIORI Elements App with BOPF as Backend. 

I implemented custom Actions, but triggered Error Messages from Backend are not displayed in FIORI but are visible in Network Console.

Backend Implementation:

 

  METHOD /bobf/if_frw_action~execute.

    DATA: usr_scenario_table TYPE Zt_pmc_usr_scen_ass.
    io_read->retrieve(
      EXPORTING
        iv_node                 = is_ctx-node_key
        it_key                  = it_key
      IMPORTING
        et_data                 = usr_scenario_table
    ).
    DATA(line) = usr_scenario_table[ 1 ].

    DATA: ls_message TYPE symsg.

    MESSAGE e000(ZPM_MO_US_MG) INTO DATA(lv_msg).
    MOVE-CORRESPONDING sy TO ls_message.

    ls_message-msgv1 = 'Errror in App'.

    IF eo_message IS NOT BOUND.
      eo_message = /bobf/cl_frw_factory=>get_message( ).
    ENDIF.

    eo_message->add_message(
      EXPORTING
        is_msg       = ls_message
        iv_node      = is_ctx-node_key
        iv_key       = it_key[ 1 ]-key
    ).

    APPEND VALUE #( key = it_key[ 1 ]-key ) TO et_failed_key.

  ENDMETHOD.

 

According to this UI5 Documentation there are two possible solutions for that:

  • Make Message Persistent
  • Defer read Operation after POST 

Topic 1: I have no idea how to make this message persistent, there is no parameter in the Message Object for that

Topic 2: I have set Attribute refreshAfterChange already to false in manifest.json file in BAS, Errors are still not displayed

 

Another User did have a similar Problem described here and solved it by addressing Importing Parameter "iv_message_target" to '/#TRANSIENT#'. But he did use another Message Container and probably had ODATA Service and not BOPF so its's not applicable for me.

Anyone got a hint?

EDIT:

After a bit of trial and error I tried deleting the selected line, Result was that i was successful and the List Report was automatically refreshed, so the above named attribute in manifest.json seems not to take effect in my Model.

SAP Fiori for SAP ERP

entry.title: Update processing status field of standard CDS I_purchaseorderapi01 using API or EML
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I am working on workflow development in BTP-SBPA. There is a requirement to update the status of PO (PurchaseProcessingStatus) in CDS I_purchaseOrderApi01 based on workflow result. I have tried using standard API for purchase order but status field is Read-only. Is there any another way to update the status ?

Backend system is S4HANA Public cloud. 

Thanks in advance!

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: Issue in previewing application in ADT
entry.content:
Hi community,

Recently I've been having issues previewing List Report applications from ADT. The environment is BTP ABAP environment in a trial account and the UI5 version is 1.127.7.

When I launch an application, it loads, but buttons such as 'Go' do not respond.  In the console, I see several errors as shown below:

When I run the application from BAS, it works as expected. However, when I launch the same app from the HTML5 Application repository, the same issue arises. I hope this is a temporary issue and will be fixed soon.

entry.title: ABAP Environment in BTP: Handling API Timeout for Long-Running Requests
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have developed an ABAP program in the ABAP Environment on SAP BTP that calls an external API. The request works fine when the response time is short, but when the request takes longer, I get a timeout error:

"The operation was timeout."

I would like to know:

  1. Is it possible to increase the timeout duration for HTTP requests in the ABAP Environment on BTP?
  2. If so, how can I configure it properly?
  3. Are there alternative solutions to handle long-running API requests in ABAP?

Here is a simplified version of my HTTP request implementation:

 

 

   DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_url( c_api_endpoint ).
  DATA(lo_client) = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( lo_destination ).
....
DATA(lo_response) = lo_client->execute( i_method = if_web_http_client=>post ).

 

 

Any guidance or best practices would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

SAP BTP, ABAP environment  API

entry.title: What will happen to https://saplearninghub.plateau.com?
entry.content:
I noticed that SAP is making it increasingly difficult to find ressources on the portal https://saplearninghub.plateau.com/learning/user/personal/landOnPortalHome.do

It seems to be treated as a legacy learning platform that is no longer encouraged. All ressources, links and accesses via the 'Learning Hub' now land in http://learning.sap.com/, which surely looks a lot more modern but also lacks some of the most useful resources the 'old' SAP Learning Hub had to offer.

In particular I am missing the feature to download PDF content for offline use and to train my AI Agents. For example, here are the results of the new learning.sap.com when searching for "restful programming":

But when I do the same search on the 'old' SAP Learning Hub, I get a different learning offering:

This links to an extensive PDF file with 84 sweet pages of pure development content:

As of now (Feb. 2025) you can only access that with a valid Learning Hub License if you happen to know the Link: https://saplearninghub.plateau.com/learning/user/personal/landOnPortalHome.do. Otherwise you are left with the online-only versions.

Maybe @kerstinblachnik or @PeterAlexander can help us: do you know if it is planned to migrate the content from saplearninghub.plateau.com to learning.sap.com?

#SAPLearningHub

entry.title: Mass programmatic deployment of Fiori Elements applications on S/4HANA 2021 On-Premise
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using XCO library to generate many RAP Business Object on S/4HANA 2021 On-Premise, with appropriate Fiori Elements annotations using OData V2 UI service binding.

The problem comes when we want to deploy these RAP BO/Applications.

Is there a way to deploy Fiori Elements applications on mass, programmatic, as a background job?

entry.title: Error returning creation data in RAP managed with save unmanaged
entry.content:
Hey guys

I'm building a study project with RAP, but I stopped at one point and can't move forward. I'm using the managed scenario with unmanaged save.

The screen is a normal screen without any changes.

When clicking save, it executes my save_modified method.

  METHOD save_modified.

    DATA: lv_msg_error TYPE string,
          lv_bookid    TYPE sbook-bookid.

    IF create-marcacaovoo[] IS NOT INITIAL.

      DATA: ls_sbook TYPE sbook.

      READ TABLE create-marcacaovoo INTO DATA(ls_voo) INDEX 1.

      ls_sbook-carrid    = ls_voo-carrid.
      ls_sbook-connid    = ls_voo-connid.
      ls_sbook-fldate    = ls_voo-fldate.
      ls_sbook-customid  = ls_voo-customid.
      ls_sbook-agencynum = ls_voo-agencynum.
      ls_sbook-class     = ls_voo-class.

      CALL FUNCTION 'ZFH_MF_MARCAR_VOO'
        STARTING NEW TASK 'UPDATE'
        EXPORTING
          is_voo = ls_sbook.

      WAIT UP TO 1 SECONDS.

      SELECT SINGLE message
       FROM zfh_t_log
       INTO lv_msg_error
       WHERE carrid = ls_sbook-carrid
       AND   connid = ls_sbook-connid
       AND   fldate = ls_sbook-fldate
       AND   customid = ls_sbook-customid
       AND   data = sy-datum.

      IF lv_msg_error IS NOT INITIAL.

        APPEND VALUE #( %tky     = ls_voo-%key
              %msg     = new_message_with_text(
              severity = if_abap_behv_message=>severity-error
              text     = lv_msg_error
           ) ) TO reported-marcacaovoo.

      ELSE.

        SELECT bookid
            FROM sbook
            INTO lv_bookid
            WHERE carrid = ls_sbook-carrid
            AND   connid = ls_sbook-connid
            AND   fldate = ls_sbook-fldate
            AND   customid = ls_sbook-customid
            AND   class = ls_sbook-class
            AND   order_date = sy-datum
            ORDER BY bookid ASCENDING.
        ENDSELECT.

        APPEND VALUE #( %msg = new_message( id = '00'
                  number = '398'
                  v1 = |Marcação de Vôo { lv_bookid } criada!|
                  severity =
                  if_abap_behv_message=>severity-success )
                  %key-carrid = ls_voo-carrid
                  %key-connid = ls_voo-connid
                  %key-fldate = ls_voo-fldate
                  %key-bookid = lv_bookid
                  %key-customid = ls_voo-customid
                  carrid = ls_voo-carrid
                  connid = ls_voo-connid
                  fldate = ls_voo-fldate
                  bookid = lv_bookid
                  customid = ls_voo-customid

                   )
                  TO reported-marcacaovoo.

      ENDIF.

    ENDIF.

  ENDMETHOD.

When successful, it continues on the Object Page screen but only with the data I entered on the screen.

When you go back to the List Report and select the created line again, it comes with the correct data.

Only after creation does it not bring the data back.

Has anyone gone through something similar?
